description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:alpine Docker image, caches the directories node_modules, src/locales, and .pip, and defines a default before_script which runs yarn install, creates a .pip directory, adds it to PATH, installs py‑pip and build‑base via apk, upgrades pip, installs awscli, conditionally installs transifex-client if $TX_TOKEN is set, sets GIT_PYTHON_REFRESH=quiet, and runs make dev-l8n-download. Add a deploy-prod job (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, executes make dev-l8n-extract, optionally pushes translations with tx, builds the React app with production environment variables (REACT_APP_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT, REACT_APP_MOTHERSHIP_API_ID, REACT_APP_MOTHERSHIP_API_KEY, REACT_APP_MOTHERSHIP_ENV) using CI=false yarn build --prod, moves the build output to a public directory, syncs public to the S3 bucket $PRODUCTION_BUCKET and creates a CloudFront invalidation for $PRODUCTION_DISTRIBUTION_ID, then stores the public folder as an artifact. Add a deploy-staging job (default stage) that runs only on the develop branch, builds the React app with staging environment variables, moves the build to public, syncs public to multiple S3 buckets (STAGING_BUCKET, TEAM_BUCKET, MOTHERSHIP_BUCKET) and creates corresponding CloudFront invalidations (STAGING_DISTRIBUTION_ID, TEAM_DISTRIBUTION_ID, MOTHERSHIP_DISTRIBUTION_ID), and publishes public as an artifact. Add a docs job (default stage) that runs only on develop, creates a docs directory, runs yarn build-storybook, moves the storybook-static output to docs/ui, syncs the docs folder to the S3 bucket $DOCS_STAGING_BUCKET under docs/client/ and invalidates the CloudFront distribution $DOCS_STAGING_DISTRIBUTION_ID, and stores the docs folder as an artifact. Set pipeline variables AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=eu-west-1 and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive.
